title: Harness Engineering
summary: Harness Engineering focuses on applying automation, developer workflows, and delivery intelligence to improve software release reliability.
content: Harness Engineering can be understood as a software delivery engineering practice centered on reducing release friction through CI/CD automation, controlled deployments, observability signals, policy checks, and developer productivity workflows. For an AI knowledge base, this topic is useful because it connects platform engineering, DevOps automation, and agent-assisted software delivery. The main value is helping teams standardize build, test, deploy, and rollback paths while preserving traceability and operational control. This draft should be reviewed against primary Harness documentation before publication.
